connections.gloss: (adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.

connections.def: probably from the base of 1096; a woman; specially, a wife:--wife, woman. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: bear, beget, birth(-day), born, (make to) bring forth (children, young), bring up, calve, child, come, be delivered (of a child), time of delivery, gender, hatch, labour, (do the office of a) midwife, declare pedigrees, be the son of, (woman in, woman that) travail(-eth, -ing woman).
he (it was that), hereof, it, she, such as, the same, these, they, this (man, same, woman), which, who
connections.def: the he (she or it), i.e. this or that (often with article repeated)

connections.gloss: [idiom] far, filthiness, [idiom] flowers, menstruous (woman), put apart, [idiom] removed (woman), separation, set apart, unclean(-ness, thing, with filthiness).
